summary: Canonical path is the already-open ProjectClownfish replacement PR #72662 for the Docker named-volume state directory ownership bug. It is not merge-ready from the hydrated preflight because relevant checks are failing and no clean Codex /review merge preflight is present, so this result plans repair of #72662 and blocks dependent closeouts until that canonical fix path is clean or merged.
